nextActions.title: Plan javax to Jakarta namespace migration
nextActions.reason: Modern Spring Boot and Hibernate migration paths require Jakarta namespace readiness.

nextActions.title: Select the applicable modernization pack
nextActions.reason: Spring Boot 2.x was not detected. This pack targets Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x migrations.

nextActions.title: Review Hibernate API and mapping upgrade risks
nextActions.reason: Hibernate 6 readiness depends on explicit review of legacy Criteria usage, Session API assumptions, custom types, and XML mappings.

nextActions.title: Review JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 migration risks
nextActions.reason: JUnit 5 readiness depends on explicit review of JUnit 4 APIs, runners, dependencies, and Vintage engine assumptions.

nextActions.title: Validate the Spring Boot 3 upgrade path
nextActions.reason: Spring Boot version evidence determines whether the Spring Boot 2 to 3 pack can support migration planning.

findingDetails.policy: Representative findings are capped at 300 entries for benchmark report JSON. Full counts are preserved in findingSummary.
